languages.text: От когитатора остался лишь оплавленный корпус, из которого выглядывают платы, покрытые толстым слоем инея. Похожие повреждения оставляет выстрел из плазмаоружия.
The cogitator is little more than a melted shell, with its frost-covered circuitry laid bare. This kind of damage is usually caused by plasma weaponry.
languages.original_text: От когитатора остался лишь оплавленный корпус, из которого выглядывают платы, покрытые толстым слоем инея. Похожие повреждения оставляет выстрел из плазмаоружия.

traits.locale_text: The cogitator is little more than a melted shell, with its frost-covered circuitry laid bare. This kind of damage is usually caused by plasma weaponry.

The cogitator is little more than a melted shell, with its frost-covered circuitry laid bare. This kind of damage is usually caused by plasma weaponry.

languages.text: Der Cogitator ist mit seinen freiliegenden und vereisten Schaltkreisen kaum mehr als eine geschmolzene Hülle. Derartige Schäden werden für gewöhnlich durch Plasmawaffen verursacht.
languages.original_text: The cogitator is little more than a melted shell, with its frost-covered circuitry laid bare. This kind of damage is usually caused by plasma weaponry.

traits.locale_text: Der Cogitator ist mit seinen freiliegenden und vereisten Schaltkreisen kaum mehr als eine geschmolzene Hülle. Derartige Schäden werden für gewöhnlich durch Plasmawaffen verursacht.

languages.text: Le cogitateur n'est plus qu'une simple coquille fondue, exposant des circuits à l'air glacé. Les armes à plasma infligent généralement ce genre de dégâts.
languages.original_text: The cogitator is little more than a melted shell, with its frost-covered circuitry laid bare. This kind of damage is usually caused by plasma weaponry.

traits.locale_text: Le cogitateur n'est plus qu'une simple coquille fondue, exposant des circuits à l'air glacé. Les armes à plasma infligent généralement ce genre de dégâts.

languages.text: El cogitador es poco más que un caparazón derretido con los circuitos expuestos y cubiertos de escarcha. Las armas de plasma suelen provocar este tipo de daño.
languages.original_text: The cogitator is little more than a melted shell, with its frost-covered circuitry laid bare. This kind of damage is usually caused by plasma weaponry.

traits.locale_text: El cogitador es poco más que un caparazón derretido con los circuitos expuestos y cubiertos de escarcha. Las armas de plasma suelen provocar este tipo de daño.

languages.text: Kavramsayar, erimiş bir kabuktan ibaret değil. Donmuş devreleri açıkta kalmış. Bu tür bir hasar, genellikle plazma silahları kaynaklı gerçekleşir.
languages.original_text: The cogitator is little more than a melted shell, with its frost-covered circuitry laid bare. This kind of damage is usually caused by plasma weaponry.

traits.locale_text: Kavramsayar, erimiş bir kabuktan ibaret değil. Donmuş devreleri açıkta kalmış. Bu tür bir hasar, genellikle plazma silahları kaynaklı gerçekleşir.

languages.text: 那台沉思者只剩下一副熔化的外壳，覆满霜冻的电路暴露在外。这类损伤通常是等离子武器造成的。
languages.original_text: The cogitator is little more than a melted shell, with its frost-covered circuitry laid bare. This kind of damage is usually caused by plasma weaponry.

traits.locale_text: 那台沉思者只剩下一副熔化的外壳，覆满霜冻的电路暴露在外。这类损伤通常是等离子武器造成的。

languages.text: 思考装置は、溶けた殻に過ぎません。霜で覆われた回路が露わになっています。この種の損傷は、通常はプラズマ兵器によって引き起こされます。
languages.original_text: The cogitator is little more than a melted shell, with its frost-covered circuitry laid bare. This kind of damage is usually caused by plasma weaponry.

traits.locale_text: 思考装置は、溶けた殻に過ぎません。霜で覆われた回路が露わになっています。この種の損傷は、通常はプラズマ兵器によって引き起こされます。
